name: bare-greeting-not-captured-as-business-name
description: Regression from a real transcript: a user mid-website-wizard who replied 'Hii' had it stored as their business NAME. A bare greeting/affirmation/filler as the WHOLE message must be re-asked, not captured — the isSimple fast-path used to take any short single-word input verbatim, bypassing the LLM extractor (whose looksRich gate already skips short inputs). State stays at WEB_COLLECT_NAME and no businessName is captured.
